title: gnidia socotrana
intro: Gnidia socotrana, a flowering plant species, is native to the Socotra archipelago in Yemen. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves containing compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is known to provide health benefits, including reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Gnidia socotrana typically involve infusions or decoctions of the roots and leaves, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
